title: Convert state-changing GET to POST
prompt: The route below is a state-changing action mounted on GET — an unsubscribe link that deletes a newsletter subscription: ```elixir scope "/", MyAppWeb do pipe_through :browser get "/unsubscribe", NewsletterController, :unsubscribe end ``` Per the Phoenix security guide, state-changing actions should never be mounted on GET because GET requests aren't protected by CSRF tokens and can be triggered via `` tags or pre-fetchers. Convert this to a POST route that is protected by CSRF. Write the corrected router to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`. The fix must use `post "/unsubscribe"` and the `:browser` pipeline.
tier_rationale: Single-line fix — get -> post. Canonical Phoenix security guide rule.
research_citation: Phoenix Security Guide: 'state changing actions... should occur via a POST request with proper CSRF protections, never via a GET request.'
